Video.summary: Josh says his world was ruined once his girlfriend gave birth to their child, so he slept with her sister; Derrick wants to dump his boyfriend so that he can be single, free and able to do his own thing.
Video.title: Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me

Image.alt: Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me
Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me
Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me

Video.summary: Insecure Star likes Deandre, but he prefers her stripper cousin; Dominic has a confession to make to his girlfriend; Kristin cheats with her husband's teenage nephew.
Video.title: I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry

Image.alt: I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry
I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry
I Used You for Sex & Money ... Sorry

Video.summary: Fefe confronts the strippers with whom her boyfriend had a threesome; stripper Monet teaches her competitive new co-worker a lesson by sleeping with her boyfriend; Cayenne meets a dancer he follows on Instagram.
Video.title: Stripnotized

Video.summary: Fred deceived his lover, Jay, so now Jay is holding Fred gets revenge. Next Terry's obsession over his stuffed panda, Yogi, is about to drive his girlfriend out of his life! Then Benny will tell his buddy that he secretly wears women's underwear.
Video.title: Amazing Tales

Video.summary: Tempers flare when Belinda's husband finds out she's cheating, but he thinks it's his fault and asks for forgiveness. Next Twist will reveal a huge secret to his fiancee ... he is really a woman!
Video.title: Unforgivable Secrets!

Video.summary: Erin's tired of playing house and is ready to tell Eric she's been cheating, and she's moving on! Then Bill's been cheating on his girlfriend for some time and is ready to move on. But wait until she hears he's been sleeping with her step-sister!
Video.title: I'm Done!

Video.summary: Rashelle's here to find out how close Jessica and Richard have really become. Then, Sean says that his dream is to marry his fiancee Jessica by the lake. But before the couple takes the plunge, he's got to get some secrets off of his chest
Video.title: Big Blow Offs

Video.summary: Jeda says that she's desperately in love with Steven. They were engaged until her sister Kayla stepped in and stole her man. Then, Ashley says that things in her life would be great if it wasn't for her boyfriend Phil's ex girlfriend Shanna.
Video.title: Sabotaged!

Video.summary: Ariana's friend wants her to dump her boyfriend for him; Samantha goes on strike because she fears that her boyfriend is cheating.
Video.title: Love Sick

Video.summary: Felicia is here to confront her boyfriend and her mother who have been sleeping together for months! Next Susan must come clean to her boyfriend and tell him she's prostituting again!
Video.title: Brawlin' Broads!

Video.summary: Unemployed Sebastian has been badgering his girlfriend, Dee, for months to become a stripper and star in adult films. Later Steve tells his girlfriend that he's secretly been videotaping their sex sessions and broadcasting them over the Internet!
Video.title: My Secret Will Shock You!

Video.summary: Tony is sleeping with his girlfriends best friend, Allen. Next Tammy’s fiancée, Ron, has no idea that she's been sleeping with her best friend, Autumn. Later Jan’s lovers, Russ and Ian, find out that Jan has yet another romantic interest in her life.
Video.title: I'm Having A Bi-Sexual Affair

Video.summary: Dewight and Tiffany hit their breaking point when she learned he was cheating with her cousin Stacy! Pro cock fighter Johnny slept with Ashly and his girlfriend Ashley is steamed! Warren’s transsexual girlfriend has a big secret!
Video.title: Cheaters Confronted

Video.summary: Trina has a surprise for Larry; Edwin wants to end things with Sadee; Shamm and Nita.
Video.title: Thirsty For a Transsexual

Video.summary: A man cheats with his girlfriend's cousin; a man cheats on his wife with his ex-lover.
Video.title: Unemployed Men Vs. Angry Gals

Video.summary: Mehren says everything would be just great with her boyfriend, John, if only his wife would leave them alone! Next Greg is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating with her best friend, Yolanda!
Video.title: I Admit ... I'm Cheating

Video.summary: A woman tells her bounty-hunter husband that she is cheating with a stripper, who turns out to be gay; a woman finds out about her boyfriend's secret lover.
Video.title: A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper

Image.alt: A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper
A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper
A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper

Video.summary: Fists fly when Cee Cee proposes to her boyfriend on the show; old flames come out of the woodwork to profess their love for Summer; Jon confesses a shocking secret to the woman he wants to marry.
Video.title: Half-Baked Proposals

Video.summary: Jon is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating on her with her brother! Next Kelly will dump her boyfriend for her secret lover, Bart. Then Malikah will tell her fiancé that she's had a secret lover for the past 3 years!
Video.title: Angry Lovers Attack!

Video.summary: Michael is here to reveal to his girl Tiffany that he may have gone a little too far with her sister when he let her practice her stripper moves on him. Now he's worried sick that Tiffany will never forgive him.
Video.title: Sister Seduction

Video.summary: Edwina slept with Mike, her godsister’s fiance! Robert’s man has been fantasizing about a woman named Morgan! Mimi will fight to keep her cheating man Trayl from her best friend Keisha!
Video.title: You've Been Caught!

Video.summary: T-Jay says it is time to share his deep, dark secret with the woman he has been seeing; Natasha wants to marry her baby's father, but he is miserable in the relationship; Sasha's boyfriend betrayed her trust.
Video.title: One Night Stands Reunited

Video.summary: Destiny admits to cheating on her live-in boyfriend with a one-night stand; an all-out battle ensues after Kashe confesses to hooking up with her cousin's girlfriend; two men challenge each other to an eating contest to win Amber.
Video.title: Chronic Cheaters

Video.summary: Rich and Dreama, bribed Dreama's sister, Tabby, to have sex with them before they would baby-sit her children so she could go to work at her local go go club. Then Steve is tired of supporting his daughter, Christy, and her lazy boyfriend.
Video.title: Country Lovin'!

Video.summary: Brittany's twin seems ready, willing and able to pick up her slack; Junior offers his wife a symbolic gesture of his love and commitment, but she has moved on; Becca is crazy about her boyfriend.
Video.title: I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin

Image.alt: I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin
I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin
I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin

Video.summary: Three best friends agree to have a threesome; Leo's fiancee confronts her cousin about some explicit photos she sent to him; Brian wants to leave his possessive girlfriend, but she refuses to give up without a fight.
Video.title: Threesomes and Throwdowns

Video.summary: A transgendered woman's boyfriend has a confession to make; Kelsey is ready to take her relationship off life support and get together with someone else; Samantha admits to hooking up with her friend's boyfriend.
Video.title: Slapped With the Truth

Video.summary: Eddie has been with his girlfriend for 3 years but he wants to tell her that he has been sleeping with a man for the last 5 months of their relationship.
Video.title: Heartless Homewreckers

Video.summary: Tim doesn't know if he wants to be with Desiree, his wife and mother of his daughter, or Victoria his gorgeous coworker and Mistress. Then, Olivia is here because she's sick and tired of her husband Fred's cheating ways.
Video.title: Saucy Mistresses

Video.summary: Jake is here because he says that he knew he was in love with his girlfriend Lindsey the first time she ever asked him for a side of cheese. Then Shaina says she's in love with not one but two beautiful girls.
Video.title: Surprise Proposals...And Punches

Video.summary: Cheyenne says her boyfriend has cheated far too many times; Chanti blames her boyfriend's behavior on social media; Selina hates her brother's ex-girlfriend.
Video.title: Secret T.H.O.T.S

Video.summary: They say that money makes the world go round. These guests say that they make money by laying on their backs!
Video.title: Prostitutes Tell All

Video.summary: After seven years of marriage and four kids, Evren and Crystal are still cheating on each other. Can their future really look any brighter! Then Sarah's not about to lose her first love Jeremy, but his cheating ways are reaching a boiling point!
Video.title: Face It...I Don't Want You!
